plan.failureSummary: Deterministic execution failed to locate cached element '[data-testid=\'radio-age-25-34\']' because the application rendered a different question set ('Set 2') lacking the age radio group.
observedIndicators: Deterministic mode (runMode: DETERMINISTIC) executed cached steps from a prior run.
Step 3 failed with 'Unable to resolve HTML element to operate with' for locator [data-testid='radio-age-25-34'].
Failure screenshot shows the survey rendered 'Set 2' containing 'Occupation' and 'What interests you?' fields, but no age radio buttons.
Flow history shows intermittent failures (77.8% pass rate over 18 runs) characteristic of cached instructions running against dynamic/unstable form variations.

remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai deterministic cache for unstable-survey.test.ts to purge stale action selectors recorded from previous form sets.

remediationSteps.summary: Retry automation run with fresh cache
remediationSteps.details: Re-run the test to allow autonomous page.ai execution to dynamically interact with the active question set ('Set 2').

plan.notes: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because cached steps expected an age radio button element from a previous run structure. The failure screenshot confirms the application currently displays 'Set 2' with different fields (Occupation, What interests you). The page.ai prompt ('Fill out the all of the survey questions...') is semantically flexible. Clearing the page.ai cache will allow the autonomous agent to re-scan the live page, adapt to 'Set 2', and complete the survey successfully.
